base_url.description: Your SearXNG instance's base URL (e.g. https://searx.example.com). No default: a SearXNG instance must be named explicitly.

api_key.description: Optional Bearer token for SearXNG instances behind an auth proxy. Public instances are open and need no credentials.

query.description: Search terms for the 'search' stream (required for that stream) and appended to the reddit-scoped query for the 'reddit' stream.

subreddit.description: Optional subreddit (without r/ prefix) to scope the 'reddit' stream's site:reddit.com query to.

categories.description: Optional SearXNG categories filter passthrough (e.g. general,news).

engines.description: Optional SearXNG engines filter passthrough (e.g. duckduckgo,google).

language.description: Optional SearXNG language filter passthrough (e.g. en-US).

page_size.description: Short-page pagination stop threshold (1-100). SearXNG's per-page result count is engine-defined; no size param is ever sent to the API — this value only decides when a page is short enough to stop paginating.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages to request; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream. SearXNG paging is fuzzy/engine-dependent, so the default is a conservative 1.
